description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests to the master branch, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should have concurrent builds with a cancel-in-progress policy. It should have two jobs: one for Ubuntu 20.04 with GCC and another for Windows Server 2019 with MinGW. Each job checks out the code, installs dependencies, configures CMake, and builds the project in parallel.
